name: Round Brilliant Cut Diamond
description: GIA-standard 57-facet round brilliant cut. Proportions based on Tolkowsky ideal cut (1919) with modern refinements.
notes: Crown height derived: girdleRadius * (1 - tableRatio) * tan(crownAngle)
Vertices and faces are generated parametrically from these parameters.
All angles in degrees. Convert to radians for computation.
